name: @metorial/token-metrics
description: Retrieve AI-powered cryptocurrency analytics, market data, and trading insights. Get real-time and historical token prices (OHLCV), AI-generated trader and investor grades, trading signals for long/short positions, market sentiment analysis from Twitter/Reddit/Telegram, AI model portfolio indices with holdings and performance, support/resistance levels, correlation analysis, quantitative metrics, scenario-based price predictions, AI-generated research reports, crypto investor scores, and top tokens by market cap. Query a conversational AI agent for on-demand market insights in plain English.
